calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73266074 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73266074 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73266074 --event evt-petition-disposition\nfind data/cases/scotus/73266074 -maxdepth 10 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|originating circuit|Ninth|SCOTUS Term|petition disposition|granted|denied\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120\nsed -n '1,280p' metrics/statpack.md\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^## ' metrics/statpack.md\nstart=$(rg -n '^## Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' metrics/statpack.md | cut -d: -f1); if [ -n \"$start\" ]; then sed -n \"${start},$((start+80))p\" metrics/statpack.md; fi","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '225,340p' metrics/statpack.md\nwc -l metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"reserved powers doctrine\" contract clause",filed_before:"2026-07-11",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","status","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation '518 U.S. 839' --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\nfind data/cases/scotus/73266074/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort || true\ngit status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73266074/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"target='data/cases/scotus/73266074/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z'
find "$target" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
git status --short -- "$target"
git diff --check -- "$target"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output)
